context: Checks whether the agent implements a working todo app: addTask adds a task to the list, markComplete marks a previously-added task as complete.

checklist.name: addTask works
checklist.description: Calling addTask("buy milk") followed by reading the list returns a single task with title 'buy milk'

checklist.name: markComplete works
checklist.description: Calling markComplete(id) on a previously-added task flips its completed flag (or equivalent state representation) to true; the task remains in the list
